data.title: Bitcoin, Dogecoin, Ether Could See Profit-Taking Even as Macro Conditions Improve
data.description:
• Bitcoin remains stable above $107,000, but signs of profit-taking are emerging in the broader crypto market.
  • DOGE, TRX, XRP, BNB, SOL, and ADA are experiencing losses, while Ether shows signs of cooling off after a recent surge.
  • Positive macroeconomic developments, such as U.S.-China trade talks and softer inflation data, are boosting sentiment in both equity and digital asset markets.

data.title: Bitcoin at $200K by Year-End is Now Firmly in Play, Analyst Says After Muted U.S. Inflation Data
data.description:
• Softer-than-expected U.S. inflation has likely set the stage for accelerated gains in BTC, potentially to $200,000 by year-end, according to a strategist at 21Shares.
  • The consumer price index rose 0.1% last month, below economists' expectations, which could prompt the Federal Reserve to ease policy.
  • Bitcoin's price was $108,440 at press time, with traders anticipating multiple rate cuts by the Fed this year.

data.title: Asia Morning Briefing: Institutional Buying Makes $3K ETH Likely, While AI Agents Seek Crypto Rails
data.description:
• Ethereum (ETH) is outperforming Bitcoin (BTC) in the derivatives market, driven by institutional demand and its role in bridging decentralized and traditional finance.
  • The stablecoin market has reached a record high, with Tron leading in stablecoin inflows due to its fast finality and deep integrations.
  • Web3 gaming faces challenges as investment declines, highlighting the need for engaging gameplay to sustain player interest.

data.title: GameStop Raising Another $1.75B for Potential Bitcoin Purchases
data.description:
• GameStop announced a new $1.75 billion convertible senior note offering after the close of U.S. trade on Wednesday.
  • GameStop started to pursue a bitcoin treasury strategy earlier this year and has acquired 4,710 BTC.
  • Shares were lower by 10% in after hours trade.

data.title: Tom Lee Mulls Roughed-Up Semler Scientific for 'Granny Shot' Portfolio
data.description:
• Semler Scientific has tumbled nearly 50% this year despite bitcoin's rally to record highs.
  • SMLR now trades at 0.859x its bitcoin NAV on a basic basis, meaning it can no longer issue shares accretively to buy more bitcoin under its ATM offering strategy.
  • Fundstrat's Tom Lee remains bullish, calling Semler a “granny shot” in his Fundstrat Capital's research portfolio.

data.title: SUI Token Trades Flat Despite Signs of Strong ETF Momentum
data.description:
• SUI gained about 2% over the past 24 hours before erasing gains later in the day as the broader crypto market was hit by macro-economic factors.
  • The token has traded higher after Nasdaq submitted paperwork for 21Shares’ proposed spot SUI exchange-traded fund.
  • It later dropped sharply in line with the broader crypto market.

data.title: Financial Advisors Remain Hesitant Towards Bitcoin — But Won’t Be for Long
data.description:
• Financial advisors are still hesitant to recommend bitcoin or crypto to clients, focusing instead on education.
  • Concerns about bitcoin's volatility, energy consumption and association with criminality persist among advisors.
  • The narrative around digital assets is shifting, with increased interest in stablecoins and smart contract platforms like Ethereum and Solana.

data.title: Ether Surges Toward $3K on Tentative U.S.–China Trade Pact and Soft U.S. CPI Report
data.description:
• Price action: Ether rose 5.56 % to $2,873.46, stretching the week’s advance to almost 12 % after punching through Tuesday’s $2,800 ceiling on above-average turnover.
  • Macro drivers: Cooling May CPI and a provisional U.S.–China trade framework spurred a broad risk-asset bid, spilling into crypto and pushing Bitcoin and major altcoins higher.
  • Institutional flows & supply: BlackRock’s reported $500 million accumulation and a record 34.65 million staked ETH (≈28.7 % of supply) continue to tighten available float and reinforce bullish sentiment.

data.title: Stripe to Acquire Crypto Wallet Startup Privy in Bid to Expand Web3 Capabilities
data.description:
• Stripe is acquiring Privy, a crypto wallet infrastructure provider, for an undisclosed amount.
  • Privy creates embedded wallets for apps and websites, simplifying crypto onboarding and reducing user drop-off.
  • The acquisition follows Stripe’s purchase of Bridge, a stablecoin infrastructure firm, and aims to make cryptocurrencies easier for developers to integrate.

data.title: ATOM Finds Support at $4.50 as Ethereum Whales Signal Potential Altcoin Season
data.description:
• ATOM has key support around $4.50, with strong buying volume confirming this level amid volatile price swings and a 3.5% daily trading range.
  • Ethereum whale activity surged 164%, boosting large transaction volumes to $7.84B, hinting at a possible altcoin season benefiting tokens like ATOM.
  • Recent price action shows a higher low at $4.522 and resistance near $4.60, indicating potential bullish momentum but caution around breakout levels.
